DISCOVERY 302, MOTION TO DEEM FACTS AS ADMITTED IS GRANTED AND THE FACTS IN REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS SET NUMBER ONE ARE HEREBY DEEMED ADMITTED. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $260.00 ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT LOURDES GARCIA AND ARE TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THE SIGNED ORDER. THE PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED BY THE PLAINTIFF WILL BE EXECUTED BY THE COURT AND FILED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 61898578)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-16-2018 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted. Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Supporting Declaration
Off Calendar Mar-08-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted and Request For Sanctions brought by Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. having been duly considered and there being no opposition thereto the court finds good cause for the granting of said motion. The Motion is hereby GRANTED and the Facts in Request For Admissions Set Number One are hereby deemed admitted. Sanctions in the amount of $260.00 are awarded against Defendant Lourdes Garcia and are to be paid within 30 days of the signed ORDER. The Proposed ORDER submitted by the Plaintiff will be executed by the court and filed. Judge Pro Tem: Dianne Peebles; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2017 Set For Trial On Apr-30-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
